name: growmodo/archive-search-bar
title: Archive Search Bar
description: Real GET-based search + 5-facet filter bar for the property archive (Location, Property Type, Pricing Range, Property Size, Build Year) — the theme's one live, query-driving behavior (Property Filter in the SOT).

body.default: Welcome to Estatein, where your dream property awaits in every corner of our beautiful world. Explore our curated selection of properties.
